author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Start Sequence Ends in One Week!

There is one week left to get your CSS Land & Habs as well as Claim Stakes with discounts and additional perks!

 Land Sale Start Sequence Perks:

•  ALL tiers come with: Hab, crafting stations, indoor/outdoor paint, ship skin, commemorative badge, and priority access to land selection and commercial plot sales
•  Tier 1 - Tier 5 come with: Ships
•  Tier 3 - Tier 5 come with: Pet Houses
•  Tier 4 and Tier 5 come with: Sculptures

 Claim Stake Start Sequence Perks:

Purchasing a Claim Stake will come with an exclusive airdrop of a Mining Drill and a Power Plant, both compatible with your selected Claim Stake tier!

Reminder: These perks are only for PRIMARY MARKET buyers. Make sure you're purchasing from a blue Star Atlas listing.

  | https://play.staratlas.com/market/?category=structure
